tasks.dev: deno task server & deno task client
tasks.compile: deno compile --allow-all --no-check --include build --include server/integrations --include server/templates --output myspeed server/index.js
tasks.compile:linux: deno compile --allow-all --no-check --include build --include server/integrations --include server/templates --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output myspeed-linux server/index.js
tasks.compile:windows: deno compile --allow-all --no-check --include build --include server/integrations --include server/templates --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output myspeed-windows.exe server/index.js
tasks.compile:macos: deno compile --allow-all --no-check --include build --include server/integrations --include server/templates --target x86_64-apple-darwin --output myspeed-macos server/index.js
tasks.compile:macos-arm: deno compile --allow-all --no-check --include build --include server/integrations --include server/templates --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output myspeed-macos-arm server/index.js
